title: Food and drink
explanation:
Food and drink

  • breakfast, lunch, dinner
  • fruit, vegetables, meat, fish
  • bread, rice, pasta, salad
  • water, juice, coffee, tea
  • Verbs: eat, drink, cook, order

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: I'd like a glass of ____, please. | *water | bread | salad
She doesn't eat ____. She's vegetarian. | *meat | juice | rice
We had pasta for ____. | *dinner | breakfast | fruit
Can I have a ____ of coffee? | *cup | plate | bowl

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option to complete these sentences. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: I had an ____ for a snack. | apple
She ordered ____ for her main course. | chicken
Would you like some ____ with your meal? | bread
The children drink ____ every morning. | milk
I started with a bowl of ____. | soup

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: Bananas and oranges are ____. | *fruit | vegetables | meat
Carrots and tomatoes are ____. | *vegetables | drinks | pasta
Let's ____ a pizza tonight. | *make | drink | fruit
I'd like to ____ the bill, please. | *pay | eat | cook
questions.feedback: Pay the bill in a restaurant.
